_note: SCAFFOLD / test fixture for the page template — not final content. Geometry + colours are from the live roster export. Images are pulled from the provided mockup (docs/mockups/mode-mode.pdf): cabinet-hero, cabinet, marquee (Faux Stained Glass), lighting close-up. Body copy is the mockup's own text where it exists (CLASSIFICATION, PROPERTIES, MATERIAL CONDITIONS, collaborators). Sections the mockup didn't detail (Shou Sugi Ban image, 3D Modeling, Interface Feedback, Welding) are left empty/placeholder — waiting on official copy + images from Matt. prev/next are the mockup's values, not a confirmed nav order.
name: NIGHTMARE KART

intro.title: CLASSIFICATION
intro.body: Realistic reproduction of mechanical keyboard f8 key, appx 15x scale. Freestanding, float mounted to base with actuator rods and return springs.
